# kCTFontPriorityDynamic

**Global Variable**

Priority of fonts registered dynamically, not located in a standard location.

## Declaration

```swift
var kCTFontPriorityDynamic: Int { get }
```

## Discussion

Dynamic fonts are either in [doc://com.apple.coretext/documentation/CoreText/CTFontManagerScope/user] or [doc://com.apple.coretext/documentation/CoreText/CTFontManagerScope/session].

## Font Priority

- **kCTFontPrioritySystem**: Priority of system fonts.
- **kCTFontPriorityNetwork**: Priority of network fonts.
- **kCTFontPriorityComputer**: Priority of computer local fonts.
- **kCTFontPriorityUser**: Priority of local fonts.
- **kCTFontPriorityProcess**: Priority of fonts registered for the process.

items.description: Priority of fonts registered for the process.
